onComponentTokens.notes: Caret reads against the field bg; tied to --brand-component-bg-default so it follows the role remap.

notes: Form-text archetype: text-entry field with optional prefix/suffix slots and label/helper rows. Sets the gold standard for textarea + select (same archetype family).
Three variants: outlined (default, transparent fill + border), filled (tinted fill + border), underline (Material-style bottom border only). All ship 15+ surface tokens per variant.

Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars. Affects focus ring, focus border, focus label color, and caret. Role does NOT override the default border (use aria-invalid for that).
aria-invalid='true' overrides role and applies danger-coloured border across all three variants. Invalid is a STATE, not a role.
Border-width is a per-side primitive (4 vars) to support asymmetric variants like underline (b=1px, others=0).
Prefix/suffix wrappers have independent per-density padding (--input-affix-px-*) tighter than label-side padding for visual balance.
